assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 22-33: The extracted CVE data table records 'Deployment context | customer-shipped' and the 'Deployment Context Lookup' section explicitly states 'Looking up rhtpa-backend in the Source Repositories table from Security Configuration' with the resulting table showing Deployment Context = customer-shipped.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 5-23: The 'Extracted CVE Data' table includes 'Affected repository | rhtpa-backend' (line 22) and 'Deployment context | customer-shipped' (line 23) as CVE metadata fields. Lines 26-33 detail the lookup from the Source Repositories table.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: All four remediation tasks contain a '### Coordination Guidance' subsection under '## Implementation Notes' with customer-shipped guidance. Found at lines 48-50 (Task 1), 96-98 (Task 2), 160-162 (Preemptive Task 1), and 215-217 (Preemptive Task 2). Each states 'This component is shipped to customers.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 49-50 (and identical text at lines 97-98, 161-162, 216-217): 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.' All three elements (CVE assignment, advisory preparation, formal disclosure) are explicitly mentioned.
